_publications._publicationTitle: STING activation reprograms the microenvironment to sensitize NF1-related malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: we found that, like human MPNSTs, mouse cis MPNSTs contained PD-L1–expressing cells... The number of PD-L1–expressing cells, however, was unchanged
details: Successfully detected PD-L1-expressing cells in mouse cis MPNSTs, with number unchanged after STING agonist treatment
